overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a hooded character walking through a dark, foggy canyon system. The character progresses from a narrow fire-lit passage through misty rock formations toward a luminous exit, transitioning from enclosed darkness to a water-filled canyon with ethereal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with fire light

events.description: fire light on left becomes more prominent as character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark foggy canyon toward distant fire light

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
warm orange fire glow illuminating the left side of the canyon
uneven dirt and rock path through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a deeply enclosed canyon passage shrouded in fog and darkness. Warm firelight glows from the left side, casting flickering illumination on the rocky walls as the character moves forward through the narrow terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with sky visible through opening ahead

events.description: sky becomes visible through narrow opening ahead as canyon walls rise
sparse vegetation appears on the right canyon wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon passage toward the light opening ahead

entered.detail: narrow vertical strip of dark blue sky visible through the canyon gap above
dark shrubs growing on the right canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrow canyon as the walls recede slightly, revealing a strip of night sky above. The fire light falls behind as sparse vegetation appears on the rocky walls, and the path leads toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon chamber with scattered vegetation and burning wreckage

events.description: exits narrow passage into wider canyon area with visible vegetation
character looks upward revealing canyon ceiling and purple ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking through the wider canyon area and looking up at the towering rock walls

entered.detail: distant fire and burning debris illuminating the canyon floor
charred tree trunks scattered near the burning wreckage
overhanging rock ceiling visible when looking upward

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider chamber where the character looks up at towering walls and an overhanging ceiling. Distant fires burn among dead trees ahead, casting an orange glow through the misty atmosphere as the character surveys the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon floor with shallow water approaching luminous exit

events.description: ground becomes covered with shallow water as character approaches bright exit
bright white light from exit arch intensifies, illuminating the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright white exit light through the shallow water

entered.detail: shallow reflective water covering the canyon floor
large bright white luminous archway marking the canyon exit
small green luminescent object on the right canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the canyon where shallow water covers the ground, reflecting the intense white light from a luminous exit arch ahead. A small green glow emanates from the right wall as the character moves toward the bright egress point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, fire-lit canyon that gradually expands into a luminous, water-filled cavern. It begins in a deeply enclosed passage shrouded in fog, where warm firelight flickers against the narrow rocky walls as the character moves forward. As the walls recede to reveal a strip of night sky and sparse vegetation, the orange glow of the fires fades behind, drawing the camera toward a brighter opening ahead. The scene then opens into a wider chamber with towering walls and an overhanging ceiling, where distant fires burn among dead trees through a misty atmosphere. Finally, the path leads into shallow water that reflects an intense white light from a luminous exit arch, passing a small green glow on the right wall before reaching the bright egress point.
